title: AEP Rater Quorum Attestation
description: v1.0.3.1 F14 backport. Multi-rater independence proof binding every score-bearing field (e.g., VG04 rubric verdicts). Universalizes the v1.0.3 HV2 closure (warden re-score + judge tiebreaker on cross-reader mean-delta > 0.5) as a schema-enforced invariant. Composes_with: doctrine/02-truth-tags.html, doctrine/41-hash-chained-receipt-ledger.html, doctrine/50-epistemic-hygiene-meta-law.html Law-3 multi-lens, doctrine/69-verification-law-and-operator-spec-sovereignty.html sec69.4 non-rescindable, doctrine/73-external-claude-receipt-laws.html sec73.5 warden-receipts-or-halt.

id.description: Stable RQA id. Recommended pattern: rqa:<artifact-slug>:<rubric-slug>:v0.

bound_to_artifact_sha256.description: Anchor: the artifact (verdict, claim, packet) this attestation binds. Drift here invalidates the attestation.

rubric_id.description: Optional id of the rubric the raters applied (e.g., 'vg04-blind-recall-v1.0.3.1'). Used by cross-rater κ computation when multiple rubrics are in play.

raters.description: N>=2 distinct raters. Validator enforces distinct session_ids AND distinct principal_ids to prevent self-attestation.

role.description: Canonical role tag. Determines lens-class for multi-lens independence audit per sec50 Law-3.

session_id.description: Session identifier. MUST be distinct across raters in this attestation (validator enforces).

time_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this rater emitted their score.

score_0_to_5.description: Score on 0-5 scale. For other scales (0-10, normalized 0-1), use RubricScore claim and project to 0-5 here.

score_label.description: Optional rubric label (corresponds to operator source.md L272-280).

prior_exposure_hash.description: Hash of (this rater's prior reads on the same artifact) computed from the hook log. Cross-rater hash equality is a smoking gun for anchoring. Validator emits RQA_ANCHORING_RISK when 2 raters share prior_exposure_hash.

read_path_excludes.description: Paths this rater was hook-blocked from reading (anti-collusion guard per doctrine/11-cortex-v-protocol.html sec3). Derived from hook log, NOT agent-supplied. Validator audits parity across raters per sec50 Law-3.

rationale_sha256.description: sha256 of this rater's rationale text. Allows audit without inlining full rationale prose.

agreement_metric.description: Which metric was computed. cohens_kappa for N=2 raters with categorical scores; krippendorff_alpha for N>=3 raters or ordinal scores; simple_mean_delta when scores are continuous and N=2-3 (the v1.0.3 default per HV2 closure).

agreement_score.description: Computed agreement value. For cohens_kappa and krippendorff_alpha: 0.0 to 1.0 (1.0 = perfect agreement). For simple_mean_delta: absolute mean-delta on the 0-5 scale (0.0 = perfect agreement; lower is better).

independence_threshold.description: Threshold that determines independence_pass. Default 0.6 for cohens_kappa/krippendorff_alpha (>= threshold passes); default 0.5 for simple_mean_delta (<= threshold passes per v1.0.3 HV2 binding).

independence_pass.description: Computed: cohens_kappa/krippendorff_alpha >= threshold OR simple_mean_delta <= threshold. PROMOTION-GATE: validator REJECTS promotion to PROVEN/RELIABLE if independence_pass = false.

verdict.description: Final verdict combining mean and independence. PASS: mean >= pass_threshold AND independence_pass. HARD_CONDITIONAL: mean < pass_threshold BUT mean > abort_floor (today's v1.0.3 case). FAIL: independence_pass=false even with mean >= threshold. ABORT: mean <= abort_floor regardless of independence.

pass_threshold.description: Mean threshold for verdict=PASS. Default 4.0 per VG04 rubric.

abort_floor.description: Mean below which verdict=ABORT (scope is not shippable). Default 3.0.

mean_score.description: Computed: arithmetic mean of all raters' score_0_to_5.

max_pairwise_delta.description: Computed: max(|score_i - score_j|) over all rater pairs. The HV2 closure threshold (>0.5 fires tiebreaker).

disagreement_decomposition.description: Per-dimension breakdown of disagreement for diagnosing rubric-definitional-gaps. Closes the v1.0.3 VG04 root cause (list-valued recall-field threshold ambiguity).

dimension_id.description: Stable id of the rubric dimension (e.g., 'failure_prevented_overlap', 'packet_id_drift', 'stop_condition_present').

max_delta.description: Max pairwise score-delta on this dimension.

drivers.description: Per-rater quoted phrases that drove the divergence. Read by curator when proposing rubric refinements.

computed_at.description: When this attestation was computed (validator timestamp).

composes_with.description: Doctrine slots / lessons / prior receipts this attestation composes with.
